name: moa-bridge
displayName: MoA Bridge - Mixture of Agents for Copilot
description: @moa chat participant — Mixture-of-Agents multi-perspective analysis via PowerShell MoA scripts

disambiguation.description: Multi-perspective analysis with multiple LLM advisors

commands.title: MoA: Configure Models
commands.description: Interactive setup: pick how many ref advisors, assign a model + role to each.

commands.title: MoA: List Available Models
commands.description: Show all chat models currently registered with vscode.lm.

commands.title: MoA: Probe Models (Ping Test)
commands.description: Send a tiny 'PONG' request to each registered model to detect expired/invalid subscriptions.

moa.refModels.description: Reference advisor roles. Each item: {role, model, systemHint?}. Use 'Moa: Configure Models' command to set this interactively.

model.description: Substring to match vscode.lm model name, e.g. 'GLM-5.2'

systemHint.description: Optional extra system-prompt hint prepended to user prompt.

moa.aggregator.description: Aggregator (synthesizer) model. Use 'Moa: Configure Models' command to set interactively.

model.description: Substring to match vscode.lm model name

temperature.description: Informational only (vscode.lm doesn't expose per-call temp yet).

moa.preferredModels.description: Fallback model name substrings (used only when moa.refModels is empty).

moa.defaultPreset.description: Default preset to use when no preset is specified in the prompt.

moa.parallelRefs.description: Fan out reference advisors in parallel (may cause cascading 4xx/5xx when models have expired subscriptions).
